title: Mybench Anchor Batch
description: One publishable anchor batch: the Merkle root over the covered ledger rows' session roots, the covered range, the chain tip, and the device signature. This is a strict whitelist of the ONLY bytes that may leave the machine (threat model §3, privacy invariant #1); additionalProperties:false makes accidental inclusion of anything else structurally impossible.

schema_version.description: Anchor batch schema version; bump on breaking changes.

row_end.description: One past the last covered ledger row index (exclusive).

row_count.description: row_end - row_start (redundant on purpose; verified on validate).

session_count.description: Number of session rows (Merkle leaves) in the covered range.

root.description: H('mybench:v1:day' || MTH(covered session roots)), lowercase hex (ADR-0002 §3).

chain_tip.description: h of the last covered ledger row — lets verifiers detect trailing truncation (ADV-6).

ts.description: UTC RFC 3339 timestamp of the NEWEST covered ledger row (ledger-derived so the artifact is deterministic; anchor time itself comes from the OTS proof).

device_pub.description: Raw 32-byte Ed25519 device public key, lowercase hex (ADR-0002 §5).

sig.description: Ed25519 signature (hex) over the canonical compact sorted JSON of this object WITHOUT the sig field.
